select_when: Better questions would change the path because the main constraint is weak inspection of assumptions, strategy choice, or evidence quality.
The team can produce answers quickly but still needs to explain how it knows and where the chain might be weak.
Self-monitoring could prevent drift by interrupting autopilot before the work hardens around a bad frame.
A problem needs explicit next-step questions that review variables, constraints, and reasoning quality before more analysis is added.
avoid_when: Reflective questioning is turning into infinite deferral that postpones commitment, experimentation, or ownership.
The inquiry is widening into low-quality information gathering instead of sharpening the next concrete move.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on self-monitoring questions that expose assumptions and reasoning drift rather than broad reflection or journaling language.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor self-improvement sprawl because the raw source is stronger on guided questioning, explicit next-step prompts, and anti-deferral discipline.
open_questions: The source spans learning, consulting, and AI prompting, so the typed output compresses several practice surfaces.

select_when.note: The activation conditions are explicit in the raw source passages on better questions changing the path, surfacing how a team knows, and preventing drift.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions come directly from the source warnings about infinite deferral and overcomplicated inquiry.

input_type.note: The raw source activates around assumption inspection and self-monitoring; the compact input label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The source naturally yields explicit self-audit questions, though the typed output label is a compact reviewed abstraction.

reasoning_types.note: Metacognitive questioning is explicitly about thinking about thinking and checking knowledge quality, while the retained taxonomy labels stay inside the frozen Layer 2B set.
